selection_rule: Include a diverse set of direct Ubuntu 24.04 package dependents on libsodium23 or libsodium-dev. Prefer packages whose sodium-backed runtime functionality can be identified from package metadata, local command help, or upstream documentation. Development-only packages are included to cover compile-time users; their runtime_functionality field is null when the -dev package itself has no runtime behavior.

dependents.runtime_functionality: Signing files and verifying Ed25519 signatures.
evidence: apt-cache depends minisign shows a direct Depends on libsodium23.
apt-cache show minisign describes it as a file signing and signature verification tool using Ed25519.
apt-cache depends shadowsocks-libev shows a direct Depends on libsodium23.
apt-cache show shadowsocks-libev describes it as a lightweight and secure SOCKS5 proxy.

dependents.runtime_functionality: Encrypted peer-to-peer Tox communication primitives used for chat, calls, and file transfer.
evidence: apt-cache depends libtoxcore2 shows a direct Depends on libsodium23.
apt-cache show libtoxcore2 describes Tox as an encrypted, distributed peer-to-peer communication platform.

dependents.runtime_functionality: Tox chat, group chat, file transfer, and audio/video call features ride on the libsodium-backed Tox stack.
evidence: apt-cache depends qtox shows a direct Depends on libsodium23 and libtoxcore2.
apt-cache show qtox lists messaging, file transfer, audio calls, and video calls among its runtime features.
apt-cache depends fastd shows a direct Depends on libsodium23.
apt-cache show fastd describes it as a Fast and Secure Tunneling Daemon.
apt-cache depends curvedns shows a direct Depends on libsodium23.
apt-cache show curvedns describes it as DNS/DNSCurve forwarding software implementing the DNSCurve protocol.

dependents.runtime_functionality: Generating Ed25519 keys for signed binary caches, plus the associated signed binary-cache support exposed by nix-store.
evidence: apt-cache depends nix-bin shows a direct Depends on libsodium23.
ldd $(command -v nix) shows the installed nix binary linking against libsodium.so.23.
nix-store --help --generate-binary-cache-key documents generation of an Ed25519 key pair for a signed binary cache.

dependents.runtime_functionality: CURVE socket authentication/confidentiality and CURVE keypair generation.
evidence: apt-cache depends libzmq5 shows a direct Depends on libsodium23.
The ZeroMQ zmq_curve documentation describes CURVE as providing secure authentication and confidentiality.
The zmq_curve_keypair documentation says ENOTSUP is returned when libzmq was not built with cryptographic support (libsodium).

dependents.runtime_functionality: Editing encrypted files with cryptmethod set to xchacha20 or xchacha20v2.
evidence: apt-cache depends vim shows a direct Depends on libsodium23.
The Vim cryptmethod help says xchacha20 encryption is provided by libsodium and requires Vim to be built with +sodium.

dependents.runtime_functionality: The built-in Sodium extension (the sodium_* APIs) for encryption, decryption, signatures, password hashing, key exchange, and related primitives.
evidence: apt-cache depends php8.3-cli shows a direct Depends on libsodium23.
The PHP Sodium manual describes the extension as a PHP interface to modern cryptographic operations including encryption, decryption, signatures, and password hashing.
The PHP installation manual says the extension is bundled with PHP and compiled with sodium support.

dependents.runtime_functionality: PyNaCl cryptographic APIs exposed to Python code.
evidence: apt-cache depends python3-nacl shows a direct Depends on libsodium23.
apt-cache show python3-nacl describes it as Python bindings to libsodium.

dependents.runtime_functionality: RbNaCl cryptographic APIs exposed to Ruby code.
evidence: apt-cache depends ruby-rbnacl shows a direct Depends on libsodium23.
apt-cache show ruby-rbnacl describes it as a Ruby binding to the Networking and Cryptography library.

dependents.runtime_functionality: R bindings for encryption, decryption, signatures, password hashing, and related primitives.
evidence: apt-cache depends r-cran-sodium shows a direct Depends on libsodium23.
apt-cache show r-cran-sodium describes it as R bindings to libsodium for encryption, decryption, signatures, password hashing, and more.

dependents.notes: This package ships Rust crate source for FFI bindings to libsodium and is used to link Rust code against libsodium at build time.
evidence: apt-cache show librust-libsodium-sys-dev shows a direct Depends on libsodium-dev.
apt-cache show librust-libsodium-sys-dev describes it as FFI binding source code for libsodium.

dependents.notes: This package supplies headers and development files for building software against libtoxcore; the runtime behavior lives in libtoxcore2, not in the -dev package itself.
evidence: apt-cache show libtoxcore-dev shows a direct Depends on libsodium-dev.
apt-cache show libtoxcore-dev describes it as development headers for the encrypted Tox communication stack.

dependents.notes: This package supplies headers and development files for building software against ZeroMQ; the runtime CURVE functionality lives in libzmq5, not in the -dev package itself.
evidence: apt-cache show libzmq3-dev shows a direct Depends on libsodium-dev.
apt-cache show libzmq3-dev describes it as ZeroMQ development libraries and header files.
